heading: Disobedience to subpoenas
label: 14909 Disobedience to subpoenas
text: Whoever does not obey a subpoena or requirement of the Secretary or the Board to appear and testify or produce records shall be fined under title 18 or imprisoned not more than 1 year, or both.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .section 11913 of this titlePub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided in , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1996Pub. L. 104–88section 2 of Pub. L. 104–88section 1301 of this title
